description:
Fix Feature Icon Visibility for Success and Info States

The feature-icon components with icon-success and icon-info classes have white backgrounds with white icons, making them invisible to users. Update the styling to ensure proper contrast and visibility.

Requirements:
- Locate the CSS/styling for feature-icon icon-success and feature-icon icon-info classes
- Change either the background color or icon color to create visible contrast
- Ensure the color scheme matches the existing design system (success = green theme, info = blue theme)
- Verify the fix works across different browsers and screen sizes
- Check if other icon states (warning, error, etc.) have similar issues
- Test in both light and dark mode if applicable
- Ensure accessibility standards are met (WCAG contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1)
title: Fix feature-icon visibility in success and info states
